entry.title: Error to change BA in asset master data
entry.content: Please be advised that the Business Area within the Asset Master Data will be updated using transaction AS02. This change will be implemented by creating a new time-dependent interval to preserve the historical audit trail for the existing asset.

entry.title: Assigning fixed assets to functional location
entry.content: How do I assign a fixed asset to a functional location?  Am I able to assign more than one asset to the same functional location?

entry.title: PSMASSCREATE_PROJ text-105 nur in Englisch vorhanden
entry.content: Der Text-105 im Standardprogramm PSMASSCREATE_PROJ ist nur auf Englisch verfügbar nicht auf Deutsch. System QS/4 100

entry.title: SAP finance fiscal year changes
entry.content:
Hey, 


I'm new to SAP finance and looking for guidance on fiscal year configuration queries:

My book says "Only one open period at any point of time for posting. .... and then..... It is compulsory that at least two posting period intervals must be opened at any given time." (both statements appear contrary)

1. Would there be only one open period for posting at any point of time? If the earlier period is opened (the rule in second statement that requires atleast 2 to be open) how do we ensure that accountants do not post in the previous period? How is this done practically?  

2. If a company wants to change fiscal year variant assigned to a company code mid year, while the period is still open, what procedure should be followed & what must be taken care of? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Asset accounting new fiscal year
entry.content:
Hello

Getting error "Fiscal Year change not yet made for co code XXX

When we try to close fiscal year 2024 in FAA_CMP , it gives error "contains assets with depreciation not posted" , but when we check in  AFAB in test run, there is no asset pending for depreciation posting in FY 2024. When we check the log, it shows no errors "fixed assets processed in total - success"

Then why are we getting the error and not able to close the FY 2024 or open FY 2026

Screenshots and issues are available in the attachment

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: How to reduce the investment support for assets acquired in the current fiscal year
entry.content:
Dear expert，

As per business requirements, we plan to activate Fixed Assets – Special Valuation – Investment Support.However, we encountered an issue during testing:None of the transaction types in AO83 can realize the reduction of government subsidy amounts for assets acquired in the current year.Specifically, we need to perform a reverse posting for transaction type I**.

entry.title: the error message AAPO149 occurred in ABT1N
entry.content:
Hello,

As we created document in ABT1N with revenue in SAP HANA edition, and the error message AAPO149 occurred. But created the same scenario in SAP ECC edition, which would generate the accounting document successfully.

We checked the configuration,  the error message AAPO149 occurred seems be caused by the two company code (0003 and A001) assigned to the same company ID (ABCD), but we are not sure about this. Does this configuration make the different results because of the different ERP edition?

entry.title: Configurando um imposto para não gerar movimentação contábil
entry.content:
Atualmente estou enfrentando dificuldades na configuração de um imposto no SAP B1 v.10.
A necessidade é que, ao utilizar esse novo imposto em um Pedido de Compra, o item lançado não gere uma Conta a Pagar. 
Já realizei diversos testes relacionados: fórmulas do imposto, configuração de IVA, atributos e parametrizações relacionadas. 
No entanto, ainda não consegui atingir o comportamento esperado.

Alguém já passou por uma situação semelhante ou conhece alguma configuração/processo que possa atender esse cenário?

entry.title: VIM- Add Tax code in Vim configuratin
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We have recently created a new tax code in our SAP system. Currently, we are using OpenText VIM (Vendor Invoice Management), and we need guidance on how to incorporate this newly created tax code into the VIM configuration.

Thanks

Nag

entry.title: Business Area on Output Tax Line Items
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We have activated business area transacting within SAP. While passing billing documents from SD to FI, the system is issuing an error "Field business area is a required entry for GL 154000". However, there is nowhere along the process where one can specify the business area.

I have tried to use substitution, but the system is only recognizing the AR reconciliation account as the only GL during the substitution process, even after giving the output tax account as a substitution prerequisite. It seems not to recognize GL 154000 as an account for substitution. 

Making the business area optional for the tax accounts is not an option, as the business requirement is that every line item posted in the system must carry a business area.

Please assist

entry.title: Low value asset area 01 not maintained
entry.content:
We have maintained in the configuration in the system TS4 Tcode OAYK setting LVA amount 500 and Max LVA amount pur as 1000.
when we are posting the PO (Me23n ) or (F-90) for the amount of Rs 500 system is allowed to post without giving any error up to the limit of 600 . We want to understand the standard behavior how it will work in SAP.
Attached the PO & document number details

entry.title: New asset created but depreciation is calculated for longer period
entry.content:
Hi,

Business created a new cloud computing asset: FA 1000024 CLM – Implementation Cost for LinkSquares. The contract term is 12/19/2025–12/18/2026, and the implementation invoice was paid in April. Business attempted to place the asset in service for 8 months so depreciation would run from May through December. However, the system is calculating depreciation over 12 months. Could someone please help adjust the depreciation schedule so it ends in December (when the contract term ends)?

I will share screenshots in the document attached. The issue is in NEP system. 

 

Regards

Kriti Palod

entry.title: PDC
entry.content:
The specific scenario requested by the client

Third-Party Settlement: Oswal purchased goods from Vendor 'X', but the payment to Vendor 'X' was made by a Third Party on behalf of Oswal.

Repayment Terms: Oswal is now liable to pay the Third Party after a 90-day period.

Adjustments: At the time of maturity, interest will be added to the principal amount. The client requires the flexibility to change the Due Date and update the Final Amount (to include interest) within the system.

Kindly suggest the best practice or the standard process flow

entry.title: 资产以前年度多折旧了，怎么冲回？
entry.content:
资产701001854，2024年资产的摊销已完成，与实际情况不符，如何处理实现把以前年度多摊销的金额冲回？

SAP版本ECC770

entry.title: Company code 6151 is not permitted as the paying company code in FBZP Config.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have developed a new company code, Q951, with reference to coco 6151 as part of a rollout project in Switzerland. We are establishing a cross-company agreement wherein the bank account in 6151 makes payments on behalf of Q951 in accordance with business requirements. For the new Coco Q951, the paying company code will be 6151. However, please be note that although both coco are from Switzerland, their functional currency is different. The currency in Coco 6151 is CHF.The currency of Coco Q951 is USD.

 

Problem: When customizing in the FBZP transaction, error F3063 occurs. After reading OSS note 2257645, we now know that in order to establish cross-company payments, both COCOs must be located in the same country and bearing the same functional currency.

 

Why this ticket: We simply wanted to know if there was another way to get around this problem and develop the cross-company payment system properly. Alternatively, if this is an unchangeable SAP standard practice.

entry.title: Cost center company code change from LTIN to LTUD
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While creating a cost center 494LE wrong we mapped to LTIN company code. Now need to correct it as LTUD. Still now no cost is booked in this cost center.  Kindly help us to correct it.

Regards,

Arun

entry.title: Item is blocked for payment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For payment run using F110, we are facing the payment exception error as Item is blocked for payment and see payment block as C in the proposal, but no block is seen in document level and customer master also looks fine.  please find the below details. Attaching screenshot for your reference.

Run Id: US18J
Payment Run Date: 14.05.2026
 
Thanks, and Regards
Sri Nidhi Dokka

entry.title: FRB1 Value is not updating in ME21N - Standard PO
entry.content:
Hi, I am doing practice on a testing system as an FI trainee. In FI-MM Integration, I am facing a horrible issue which has taken my hours but I could not find to solve it. 

The issue is in ME21N - Standard Purchase Order.

 

 

The issue is that, FRB1 value is not updating. I have got into various configuration settings with the help of Gemini and the situation now is becoming more and more frustrating to me. 

Following are my few screenshots of configurations:

1) Define Condition Types - FRB1

2) Set Calculation Schema - Purchasing 

3) OBYC for FR1

 

I don't understand where the problem is. Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: DMEE Transaction
entry.content:
Hello Team,

This is regarding the issue where the user needs to populate both IBAN and Bank Account values in the DMEE transaction.

Specifically, in the path:
DMEE → PmtInf → CdtTrfTxInf → CdtrAcct → Other → Id

  • The IBAN value should be populated under Other → Id (when available)
  • The Vendor Bank Account should be populated under Other → Id (if IBAN is not maintained)

However, despite trying multiple conditions as per the below configurations, we are observing that the IBAN value is still populating in the IBAN field and the Bank Account in (Other → Id), instead of correctly populating both fields as required.

Could you please assist us in guiding on how to correctly populate:

  • IBAN in the Other → Id
  • Vendor Bank Account in the Other → Id field (when IBAN is not available)

Thanks

Pooja

entry.title: API Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous) - additional Freely Defined Currencies
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use the SOAP API service:JOURNALENTRYBULKCREATIONREQUEST_INfor FI journal entry postings. 

I would like to use it also to provide amounts for additional Freely Defined Currencies, not only 1, as it is in SAP documentation.
Business case scenario is to reclassify balances only in Freely Defined Currencies in example from 1 - 4 only - just like in manual app "Post Currency Adjustments". 

Questions:

  1. Is it possible to extend or enhance JOURNALENTRYBULKCREATIONREQUEST_IN to support additional freely defined currencies? For example by adding new section for those currencies in WSDL / generated SOAP structure?
  2. Are there newer API versions/services that expose all configured freely defined currencies?
  3. Is this limitation expected by design?
  4. Would SAP recommend using another API/BAPI instead (for example BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST) for postings with multiple freely defined currencies?

I would appreciate any experience or recommendations from projects using multiple freely defined currencies with FI posting APIs.

Thanks!
